breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome's Eclipse Prediction Range Is 5× Wider Than Its Own Homepage Claims
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome's homepage headline says '−17 to −21 nT' but the actual registered predictions span −5 to −26 nT across two baselines and 9 INTERMAGNET stations. The conservative baseline falls entirely within what standard ionospheric physics predicts. Section 8.11 and Section 4.2 now document the full dual-baseline structure.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: The dome's marketing (homepage) is measurably more extreme than its actual registered predictions — a systematic misrepresentation that we now document with specific numbers.
